Since each row represents a draft pick and the "nationality" column indicates the origin of each pick, we need to group by the "nationality" column to check if there are any picks from other countries. All the draft picks listed in the table are from the United States (Group ID 1 with count 11). There are no draft picks from any other nationality mentioned.
